prompt: Create an invoice for the customer Bergström AB (org no. 556789012) for two items: 'IT Consulting' at 15000 NOK excl. VAT (10 hours at 1500 NOK/hour) and 'Software License' at 8500 NOK excl. VAT (1 unit). Use 25% VAT on both. Send the invoice by email to invoices@bergstrom.se.
notes: Multi-line invoice in English. Two products, two order lines. Tests ability to create multiple products and order lines on a single invoice.
